title: Magic Cores
description: A Brand New Plugin For Your Private Smp New Era And Unique Consept ☠️🔥
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FbwNrwSAGLA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>![All power is here just click right click to save it in your body than click shift+Right click](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26d71c5c2dd39fa5f805f8900631026ff9a85b74_0.webp)<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/h72EVxQ1REU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


🌌 CORE ABILITIES PLUGIN  
30 Unique Powers for Every Player!

CORE is a powerful Minecraft plugin that gives players 30 unique custom abilities — each with its own effects, powers, and playstyle. On their first join, every player automatically receives a special ability that completely changes their gameplay.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🔥 KEY FEATURES
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🌀 30 UNIQUE ABILITIES  
• Each ability has its own custom effects and mechanics  
• Covers combat, movement, defense, magic, and more  
• Fully balanced ability system

🎁 FIRST JOIN ABILITY REWARD  
• Players get a random unique ability on their first join  
• Awarded only once — fair and automatic  
• Zero admin setup required

⚡ MAIN COMMAND: /core  
• View ability info  
• Check your ability  
• Admin management tools  
• Simple and user-friendly

⏳ GRACE PERIOD SYSTEM  
• Players get a safe-time period after joining  
• PvP is disabled during grace  
• Damage protection enabled  
• Live grace timer tracking system

📊 ADVANCED TRACKER  
• Ability status tracking  
• Real-time grace countdown  
• Clean notifications and UI messages

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🚀 WHY USE CORE?
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
• Perfect for Survival, Lifesteal, Factions, One-Life, RPG, and SMP servers  
• Lightweight and lag-free  
• Easy setup for beginners  
• Every player gets a unique and exciting experience

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📌 COMMAND
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
/core  
(Main control command)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🌟 PERFECT FOR SERVER OWNERS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
If you want to make your server more unique, engaging, and powerful, CORE is the perfect choice.  
Players get 30 custom abilities that take your entire world to the next level.
